user.title: Search Nearby Superchargers
user.description: Enter coordinates to find the closest Tesla Superchargers. Default values use your Home Assistant location.

select.title: Select Supercharger
select.description: Select one of the nearby Superchargers found.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Tesla API. The API might be down or unreachable.
error.invalid_location: Invalid location slug. Tesla API returned an error or no data for this location.
error.rate_limit: Too Many Requests (429). Tesla has temporarily rate-limited your IP. Please try again later.
error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON data received from Tesla API.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please check logs.

abort.already_configured: This Supercharger location is already configured.
